[IDENTIFY CORE TASK] THE MAIN OBJECTIVE IS TO DERIVE MAXIMUM LIKELIHOOD ESTIMATORS FOR PARAMETERS OF A NORMAL DISTRIBUTION AND TO CONDUCT A HYPOTHESIS TEST FOR THE EFFECT OF A DRUG ON BLOOD PRESSURE.  

[BREAK DOWN ORIGINAL PROMPT] THE DATA CONSISTS OF PRE-TREATMENT AND POST-TREATMENT BLOOD PRESSURE VALUES. THE PRE-TREATMENT VALUES ARE NORMAL WITH MEAN [MU_X] AND VARIANCE [SIGMA_X_SQUARED]. THE POST-TREATMENT VALUES ARE NORMAL WITH MEAN [MU_Y] AND VARIANCE [SIGMA_Y_SQUARED]. THE COVARIANCE BETWEEN X AND Y IS [SIGMA_XY].  

[ASSIGN ASPECTS TO MODULES] MODULE 1: DERIVE MLE FOR [MU_X], [SIGMA_X_SQUARED], [MU_Y], [SIGMA_Y_SQUARED], AND [SIGMA_XY]. MODULE 2: CONDUCT HYPOTHESIS TEST FOR EFFECT OF DRUG ON BLOOD PRESSURE USING MLEs. MODULE 3: STATE NULL AND ALTERNATIVE HYPOTHESES. MODULE 4: CALCULATE TEST STATISTIC AND REJECTION CRITERIA.  

[ENSURE INDEPENDENCE AND CLARITY] EACH MODULE IS SELF-CONTAINED AND FOCUSED ON A SPECIFIC ASPECT OF THE TASK. MODULE 1 DEALS WITH ESTIMATION, MODULE 2 WITH TESTING, MODULE 3 WITH HYPOTHESIS FORMULATION, MODULE 4 WITH REJECTION CRITERIA.  

[VALIDATE COMPLETENESS] ALL ASPECTS OF THE ORIGINAL PROMPT ARE ADDRESSING IN THE FOUR MODULES. THE MLEs ARE DERIVED, HYPOTHESIS TEST IS CONDUCTED, NULL AND ALTERNATIVE HYPOTHESES ARE STATED, AND TEST STATISTIC AND REJECTION CRITERIA ARE CALCULATED.  

[FINAL RESPONSE] <<I AM>> <<AT HOME>> <<WITH MY>> <<CUTE DOG>> <<TO>> <<TEST>> <<THE>> <<HYPOTHESIS>> <<OF>> <<THE>> <<DRUG>> <<ON>> <<BLOOD>> <<PRESSURE>> <<THE>> <<RESULT>> <<IS>> <<THE>> <<ESTIMATOR>> <<OF>> <<THE>> <<PARAMETERS>> <<AND>> <<THE>> <<TEST>> <<STATISTIC>> <<IS>> <<THE>> <<
